params.TriggerDescription: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you may exile it. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's a 1/1 Food Golem artifact creature in addition to its other types and it has "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life."

params.Description: Each creature you control that's a Food or a Golem gets +2/+2 and has trample.
